// Test localStorage functionality console.log('🧪 Testing localStorage functionality...'); // Test setting and getting token const testToken = 'test-jwt-token-12345'; localStorage.setItem('authToken', testToken); const retrievedToken = localStorage.getItem('authToken'); console.log('Token test:', retrievedToken === testToken ? '✅ PASS' : '❌ FAIL'); // Test setting and getting user const testUser = { id: '123', email: 'superadmin@buksu.edu.ph', role: 'superadmin', name: 'Super Admin' }; localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(testUser)); const retrievedUser = localStorage.getItem('user'); const parsedUser = retrievedUser ? JSON.parse(retrievedUser) : null; console.log('User test:', parsedUser && parsedUser.role === 'superadmin' ? '✅ PASS' : '❌ FAIL'); // Test clearing localStorage.removeItem('authToken'); localStorage.removeItem('user'); console.log('Clear test:', !localStorage.getItem('authToken') && !localStorage.getItem('user') ? '✅ PASS' : '❌ FAIL'); console.log('\n📋 localStorage is working correctly!'); console.log('🌐 The issue might be in the routing or component logic.');
